Class BoardView

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
javafx.scene.layout.GridPane
gui.BoardView
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class BoardView extends javafx.scene.layout.GridPane
The main container for the game's graphical user interface.

BoardView organizes player areas, the central battlefield (FieldTableView), and the menu system using a GridPane layout. It also manages the overlay layer for animations like dice rolls. * @author GeminiCollaborator

  • Constructor Details

    • BoardView

      public BoardView()
      Initializes the BoardView with a fixed resolution and base styles.

  • Method Details

    • refresh

      public static void refresh()
      Rebuilds the entire game board UI based on the current state in GameEngine. This method clears existing components and re-adds them to their specific grid positions.

    • showOverlay

      public static void showOverlay(javafx.scene.layout.StackPane overlay)
      Displays a temporary overlay (e.g., DiceRoll, Card Selection) over the central field. * @param overlay The StackPane containing the UI to be displayed.

    • clearOverlay

      public static void clearOverlay()
      Removes the current overlay and restores click interaction to the field below.

    • reStartGame

      public static void reStartGame()
      Resets the game state and UI. (Logic to be implemented).
